name: Sour Cream Apple Pie
recipeInstructions:
--------------------------TOPPING--------------------------
1/3 c All-purpose flour
1/4 c Sugar
1/4 c Light brown sugar, packed
2 1/2 ts Cinnamon, ground
3/4 c Walnuts, chopped
6 tb Butter, unsalted
peeled, cored, and thinly sliced
chilled and cut into pieces
In a large bowl, combine sour cream, egg, vanilla, sugar, salt, and flour. Stir until well blended. Add apples and stir again.
Pour the mixture into the unbaked pastry shell. Bake at 425 degrees for 10 minutes. Reduce heat to 350 degrees and bake an additional 30 minutes.
TOPPING:
In a bowl, combine all topping ingredients until the mixture resembles coarse meal. Spread the topping over the pie. Bake at 350 degrees for an additional 15 to 20 minutes, or until filling is bubbly.
